chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 3790 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge FOR ORDERS ON NON-PROSECUTION 1. For orders on Misc. No. 19434/2023. 2. For orders as to non-prosecution.. 06.09.2023: None for the petitioner. ------ Petitioner is called absent, no intimation is received, inspite of the fact that today, the matter is fixed in Court on urgent application filed by the petitioner, however, he has chosen to remain absent without any intimation. It further appears that on 22.08.2022, when the matter was fixed in Court, petitioner was directed to implead Sindh Solid Waste Management Department as a party by filing amended title within seven days’ time, however, it appears that needful has not been done. Perusal of the Memo of Petition shows that no specific cause of grievance or violation of law or any fundamental right requiring this Court’s interference under Article 199 of the Constitution has been shown, whereas, directions sought through instant petition otherwise involves policy decision of the Government. As regards violation of orders of the Hon’ble Supreme Court, nothing has been placed on record to support such allegation. It appears that petitioner is in the habit of filing petitions against large number of Government officials, developers and builders just to cause harassment, as no specific grievance or violation of law or any fundamental right has been shown, nor the petitioner after filing such petitions pursue the same, which reflects upon his malafide. Accordingly, instant petition being misconceived is dismissed alongwith listed / pending applications.

It appears that petitioner is in the habit of filing petitions against large number of Government officials, developers and builders just to cause harassment, as no specific grievance or violation of law or any fundamental right has been shown, nor the petitioner after filing such petitions pursue the same, which reflects upon his malafide. Accordingly, instant petition being misconceived is dismissed alongwith listed / pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE A.S/F.A.
